blockers.description: No active technical blocker. Final mvn verify was aborted by user pause, not by a test failure.
blockers.workaround: Resume by rerunning the exact mvn verify command from the repo backend directory.

human_actions_pending.action: Resume in a new session and continue Phase 02-07 through $gsd-resume-work or $gsd-execute-phase 2.
human_actions_pending.context: User intentionally paused because they need to wrap up.

decisions.decision: Access policies are administered through a new AccessPolicyService and AccessPolicyController.
decisions.rationale: Matches /api/v1/access-policies contract and keeps role-scoped policy rules out of controllers.

decisions.decision: ResolvedAccessFilter always includes PUBLIC and falls back to all doc types plus wildcard departments when no policies exist.
decisions.rationale: PUBLIC must remain visible while non-public access fails closed.

decisions.decision: Generic mutation audit events now participate in the caller transaction, while auth audit remains independent.
decisions.rationale: REQUIRES_NEW caused FK failures for newly created users before the outer transaction committed.

decisions.decision: Audit repository nulls actor/target IDs that are not present in users.
decisions.rationale: The audit schema allows nullable actor/target, and controller tests use JWT subjects without matching user rows.

next_action: Run C:\dev\apache-maven-3.9.15\bin\mvn.cmd --% -q -pl corp-rag-app -am verify from backend, then create 02-07-SUMMARY.md and mark Phase 2 Plan 07 complete.
